channel.title: Data-Pipeline on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Pipeline on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Debezium vs Maxwell vs Canal: Best Self-Hosted CDC Tools 2026
item.description: Change Data Capture (CDC) is the backbone of modern data pipelines. Instead of running expensive, slow batch jobs that poll your database every few minutes, CDC streams every INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE in real time — giving downstream systems an exact replica of your data with sub-second latency.

item.title: RudderStack vs Jitsu vs Snowplow: Best Self-Hosted CDP 2026
item.description: Customer data platforms (CDPs) sit at the center of your data infrastructure. They collect events from your websites, apps, and servers, then route that data to warehouses, analytics tools, and marketing platforms. For years, Segment was the default choice — until its acquisition by Twilio, rising costs, and data residency concerns pushed teams toward open-source alternatives.
